programme.desc: Ann Maurice and Tris Payne visit Southampton's prestigious marina development Ocean Village, where a couple's home needs sprucing up to attract potential buyers after being on the market for three months

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell offers an insight into the history, design and building process of the Britannia Bridge, across the Menai Strait between the island of Anglesey and the mainland of Wales

programme.title: Ice Age (2002)
programme.desc: Three mismatched prehistoric animals join forces to return a human infant to its tribe - but as their journey unfolds, the creatures fail to anticipate the many perils and pitfalls that lay in store for them. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of John Leguizamo, Ray Romano, Denis Leary, Goran Visnjic and Jack Black

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx

programme.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again (1976)
programme.desc: Inspector Clouseau fends off a murder syndicate led by his former police chief Dreyfus, who has been driven insane by his hatred for the bungling detective. However, doing away with the lucky lawman proves harder than anticipated - even for the world's best assassins. Comedy sequel, starring Peter Sellers, Herbert Lom, Lesley-Anne Down, Burt Kwouk and Leonard Rossiter

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: The Terminal (2004)
programme.desc: An Eastern European en route to America is stranded at JFK Airport when a coup in his native country leaves him in a diplomatic no-man's land. His nation ceases to exist, meaning he can neither return home nor set foot on the streets of New York. Stuck indefinitely inside the terminal, he sets out to make some sort of a life for himself. Steven Spielberg's comedy, with Tom Hanks, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Stanley Tucci and Chi McBride

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)
programme.desc: Hitman Arthur Bishop's arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his new girlfriend Gina and blackmails him into committing three assassinations in as many days, while making them look like accidents. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Jessica Alba, Sam Hazeldine and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Happy Death Day (2017)
programme.desc: A college student must relive the day of her murder over and over until she discovers her killer's identity. Horror, starring Jessica Rothe, Israel Broussard and Ruby Modine

programme.title: Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping (2016)
programme.desc: When it becomes obvious that his solo album is a flop, a former boy band member does everything he can to maintain his celebrity status. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg, Jorma Taccone and Akiva Schaffer

programme.title: Grandma (2015)
programme.desc: A woman recovering from a break-up receives an unexpected visit from her granddaughter, who desperately needs to raise $600 before the end of the day. They visit a series of old contacts in search of a loan, which leads to long-buried secrets coming to light. Comedy drama, starring Lily Tomlin and Julia Garner

programme.title: Carry On Spying (1964)
programme.desc: A secret formula is stolen by a sinister organisation masterminded by the evil Dr Crow. The British government plans to assign its top agents to deal with the crisis, but owing to staff shortages, has to settle for a bungling spy and his three hapless trainees. Comedy, starring Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Barbara Windsor, Bernard Cribbins, Jim Dale, Eric Barker and Victor Maddern

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness Interview Special
programme.desc: Director JJ Abrams discusses making the second instalment in the sci-fi series

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Warrior (2011)
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers are drawn to enter a mixed martial arts tournament, one a military veteran looking for a way to escape his troubled past, the other a struggling teacher who needs the prize money to support his family. As they progress through the contest, both emerge as likely winners - putting them on course to face each other in the final. Drama, with Joel Edgerton, Tom Hardy and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Drag Me to Hell (2009)
programme.desc: A bank employee refuses a mortgage extension to an elderly woman, who responds by placing her under a curse. As she endures a series of unexplained misfortunes, she discovers a demon has been sent after her, and if she cannot break the spell in three days, it will take her to Hell. Sam Raimi's horror, starring Alison Lohman, Justin Long and Lorna Raver

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A magical Christmas tale of nine-year-old Libby and a tiny signing fairy who comes to grant her wishes, albeit in a rather unexpected way

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel

programme.title: Over the Hedge (2006)
programme.desc: A raccoon trickster is fretting about his debt to a fearsome bear when he stumbles on some animals waking in the woods after their winter nap. Spotting the chance to solve his problem, the raccoon dupes the gullible creatures into stealing food from a nearby suburb so he can give it to the bear - but they fail to realise they will soon be at the mercy of a vermin exterminator. Animated comedy, with the voices of Bruce Willis, Steve Carell, Garry Shandling and William Shatner

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)
programme.desc: Martial arts master panda Po continues to hone his skills when an evil peacock, who was banished from China for trying to build a deadly new weapon, returns to cause more chaos. It falls to Po to defeat him, but he suffers strange flashbacks revealing a connection between his past and the sinister bird. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman

programme.title: Fantastic Four: Rise of the Silver Surfer (2007)
programme.desc: The super-powered team takes on a mysterious alien who has been sent by his planet-eating master to prepare Earth for obliteration. While the four heroes try to find a way to foil its plans, an old enemy returns, intent on seizing the extraterrestrial's power. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Michael Chiklis, Chris Evans and Jessica Alba, with the voice of Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (2013)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen's victory in a televised death match makes her a focus for revolution against the totalitarian nation she lives in. The rulers of the regime plot to crush dissent with a new series of games, in which past champions battle it out. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on the second book in Suzanne Collins' trilogy of novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Liam Hemsworth, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Kingsman: The Secret Service (2015)
programme.desc: A streetwise teenager is taken under the wing of his dead father's old colleague, an agent working for a super-secret spy organisation. Will the youngster turn out to be a chip off the old block by proving useful during a battle against a twisted, hi-tech genius? Action comedy based on a comic book, starring Colin Firth, Taron Egerton and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Unbroken (2014)
programme.desc: An Olympic athlete enlists in the US Air Force during the Second World War. When his plane is shot down, he and two crewmates survive for 33 days lost at sea. Worse is to come when they are captured by Japanese forces, and he endures brutal treatment in a PoW camp run by an infamous war criminal. Fact-based Second World War drama, directed by Angelina Jolie and starring Jack O'Connell and Domhnall Gleeson

programme.title: Slow West (2015)
programme.desc: A Scottish teenager travels to America at the end of the 19th century. He travels across the frontier in the hope of being reunited with the woman he loves, aided in his travels by a mysterious drifter and stalked through the wilderness by an outlaw. Western, starring Kodi Smit-McPhee and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, featuring the master of business card throwing, the best way to calm a crying baby, and a dating agency for sea captains

programme.title: Christmas at the Palace (2018)
programme.desc: A former professional ice skater is hired by a king to help his daughter in a Christmas skating performance. Romantic drama, starring Merritt Patterson and Andrew Cooper

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost visits Hawaii to give advice to Heather and Todd, whose triplets have grown into wild screaming toddlers and they became polarised in the way to deal with them

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Love-struck groom Micky has three weeks and £13,000 to plan the perfect wedding for demanding bride-to-be Sophia. However, while Sophia wants a blingy wedding that puts her centre stage, Micky is hoping to impress her with a winter wonderland

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Ollie and Gareth's big day finally arrives, Tristan makes Liv a tempting offer and Sam and Zara reflect on the past few months of emotional turmoil and meet up for a heart-to-heart

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: The Winners
programme.desc: The first of two specials paying tribute to the winners from past shows, made to celebrate the series' 10th anniversary. The first programme focuses on the winners from the first five series, reliving their most memorable moments, from their first Signature challenge to their final Showstopper

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: An argument between Leonard and Sheldon over the ending of a Harry Potter book affects Amy and Penny's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Howard goes on a trip to Las Vegas with Bernadette and asks Raj to keep an eye on his mother while he is away

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny celebrate Valentine's Day, but their evening takes a turn for the worse when the latter's ex-boyfriend proposes to his girlfriend in the same restaurant. Meanwhile, Sheldon enlists the help of his assistant Alex to find the perfect gift for Amy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon discover their favourite childhood TV science show host Professor Proton can be booked for private parties and decide to hire him to entertain them. Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys invite the girls to a Dungeons and Dragons night when their trip to Vegas falls through after an incident with airport security. However, following a few drinks, Sheldon and Amy's relationship takes an unexpected turn. Meanwhile, Raj goes on a date with Lucy, who tries to sneak out of the restaurant's bathroom window - but ends up getting stuck and calling for his help

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is offered an exciting job opportunity, but it will mean he has to leave the country for several months. Penny tries to support his ambitions, while Sheldon is jealous and attempts to discourage him from accepting the post. Meanwhile, Raja pushes the boundaries with Lucy, but puts their relationship in jeopardy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Penny bond as they miss Leonard, and Howard tries to help Raj get over his break-up with Lucy. Meanwhile, Bernadette and Amy visit an out-of-town biology convention. Comedy about four high-achieving scientists, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard returns from his research expedition in the North Sea and undergoes an adjustment period with Sheldon. Howard experiences an unusual emotional reaction as a result of his relationship with his mother. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg star

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: With his parents recently divorced, privately educated Will has to move to a new area and make friends at the local comprehensive, where he meets Simon, Jay and Neil. First episode of the comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The comedians gather for the grand final, to find which one of them will be going home with Taskmaster Greg Davies' golden head - a prize that lies within the grasp of four of them. But there are still more games to be played, leading to Katherine Parkinson searching for a spider, Daisy May Cooper destroying a mannequin and Johnny Vegas's pocket watch finally coming in handy

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by American Murder: The Family Next Door, Simply Nigella, The Andrew Marr Show's interview with Boris Johnson, Top Gear, The Savoy, Surgeons: At the Edge of Life, The Yorkshire Vet, and BBC and ITV News coverage of President Trump and coronavirus. programme.title: Duncanville
programme.desc: After overcrowding at the swimming pool, Annie and Jack share their old swimming spot with the kids. Animated comedy revolving around a 15-year-old boy with a rich fantasy life

programme.title: Duncanville

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta faces paying back all the money he has borrowed from his colleagues over the years, and goes to great lengths to keep a secret about Sergeant Jeffords. Santiago and Captain Holt team up to reopen the Brooklyn Broiler arson case

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Santiago tries to encourage her colleagues to take a Christmas photo, only to be met with a lack of enthusiasm - and Diaz's refusal to smile. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg

Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jules Hobbs hosts the first festive dinner party from south-east London, focusing on a 'glitz and glamour' theme. She dishes up Santa's Cheeky Lobster Surprise, before unveiling the evening's entertainment - dancing girls who sing Christmas songs to the bemused guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Eccentric banker Tom Judge hosts the second dinner party in south-east London. He hopes his Dickensian Christmas-themed evening, complete with bell-ringing, kazoo playing, a dead eel as a table decoration and 'Mr Fizzy Wigs' punch, will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: History buff John Stevens presents the third festive dinner party from south-east London, where his guests are given the chance to experience an authentic taste of wartime austerity with a 1941-style Christmas - but how will they feel about the simple rations they are forced to eat as part of the host's theme for the night?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal assistant Kate Kershaw hosts the fourth festive dinner party from south-east London, asking her guests to come dressed as their favourite Christmas word - but tensions rise when they discover a surprising secret in her wardrobe

However, he hopes his snow machine and festive capers will be enough for him to take the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.desc: Edward comes up with a menacing plan. Meanwhile, Mercedes is excited by the plans to bring Bobby home for New Year's Eve

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Lou Sanders displays some very unusual facial hair, Iain Stirling's beatboxing causes him some problems and Paul Sinha shows off his full acting range

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta, Boyle and Gina get involved in a Die Hard-type hostage situation while doing some off-duty shopping on Christmas Eve, so Jeffords is forced to leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some very famous faces join the series' opinionated viewers in a special episode for the 2019 Stand Up to Cancer appeal. Plus, returning from the recent series are Nick and Liv Grimshaw, Denise Van Outen and Eddie Boxshall, and Martin and Roman Kemp

programme.title: First Dates Specials
programme.desc: A festive edition of the dating show in which singletons meet up with possible partners at a restaurant in the hope of finding love, before deciding whether they want to take things further. This time, former bodybuilding champion Kieran goes on a date with 23-year-old student nurse Abi. Meanwhile, 67-year-old Suzy is set up with Fred, a fellow divorcee who is looking for some excitement in his life, and single mother Amy meets 29-year-old Geordie Scott

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friend's sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon stumbles upon a major scientific breakthrough, causing him to feel like a fraud, while Penny steps up her game with Leonard after seeing Howard make a romantic gesture to Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on My Next Guest Needs No Introduction with David Letterman and Kim Kardashian, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, the Good Morning Britain interview with Nigel Farage, Strictly Come Dancing, Don't Rock the Boat, The Undoing and BBC News coverage of Covid-19, the English lockdown and the death of Sean Connery

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Lou Sanders displays some very unusual facial hair, Iain Stirling's beatboxing causes him some problems and Paul Sinha shows off his full acting range

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Connor seeks revenge on Angel for his misfortunes, while Cordelia receives a message from the Powers That Be, ordering her to leave this world and move on to another. David Boreanaz and Charisma Carpenter star

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maître D' Fred Sirieix and his team fling open the doors of the restaurant of romance once more, and first in is self-confessed party animal Nikita - a 24-year-old from Swansea who's hunting for someone just as wild. However, she gets a little more than she bargained for when engineer Rhys reveals a rather intimate tattoo. Part-time fitness instructor and disco dancer Selvin meets Donna, who seeks a man who can make her laugh. Former Playboy bunny Kelly-Ann is a model who's dated some A-list stars in her time and wants 'a daring man' to keep her feeling alive. Will tattooed motorbike daredevil Stephen tickle her fancy?

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira worries that salacious photos from her past will jeopardise the campaign, Johnny swallows his pride to ask for financial help and Alexis finally becomes gainfully employed

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon introduces Amy to Raiders of the Lost Ark - one of his favourite films - and is distraught when she ends up pointing out a plot hole that ruins the whole story. Meanwhile, Leonard realises he can manipulate Penny into feeling sorry for him when his mother publishes a reveal-all book about his childhood problems. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon re-evaluates the time he spends with Amy when she takes a job at the university. Meanwhile, Howard is forced to sleep on his friend's sofa after he gets into an argument with Bernadette. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Simon Helberg and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another chance to see some of the programme's more memorable investigations, including Kate Quilton's investigation into saffron fraud in the Atlas Mountains, Morocco, Mark Tebbutt's exploration of how glace cherries are made and Jimmy Doherty's revelation into what pub grub favourite whitebait actually is

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Cheshire woman Anne Hunt has long-dreamed of buying a property in Spain where she can spend her new found free time relaxing in the sun. With best friend Sharon along to help her with the decision, Danni Menzies shows Anne five properties on the southern Costa Blanca for her £50,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Guy and Julie Sadler from Brighton have travelled all around the world together and have long dreamed of relocating somewhere warm. Now, although they've never been to Spain, they've decided that Almería has the perfect balance of sunshine and affordable property. Laura Hamilton shows them five homes for their £100,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Bonnie Motley from Hertfordshire is looking to improve her quality of life, and is convinced buying a holiday home in the guaranteed sunshine of southern Spain is just the way to do that. With friend of 30 years Jonathan along to help her with the decision, Ben Hillman shows Bonnie five properties within her £20,000 budget

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who struggled to compromise during their house searches. Back in 2014, he helped Lia and Andrew find a home for a growing family in south-east London. A year later he was in Surrey and Hampshire with Sue and Allan, who had returned to the UK from Australia - only to find their generous budget of £450,000 would not stretch to the spacious apartment they had Down Under

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who had high hopes for their first homes. He helped Keon and Zoe search west and south London, while Kirstie Allsopp was with Laura and Phil, who wanted to settle in Bath. What twists and turns have their lives and property hunts taken?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Driving instructor Ray Dodd hosts the first dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but finds his guests a difficult crowd to please. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Recruitment executive Michelle Watson welcomes the diners to her home for the second dinner party of the week in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, but the previous night's host Ray Dodd is hungry for revenge following stinging criticism of his efforts. Michelle's cooking also fails to impress Joseph Benneh, so her hopes of scooping the week's prize rest with her choice of entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Stuart Henson hosts a safari-themed dinner party on the third night in Milton Keynes. He hopes his exotic menu of zebra steak and 'elephant dung surprise' will please his guests, but after the insults of the previous night he faces a difficult challenge to persuade his fellow diners to get along

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Choir director Joseph Benneh hosts the fourth dinner party in Milton Keynes, hoping the flavours from his homeland Ghana and a vocal masterclass will prove a winning combination. The guests' expectations are high, so he is under pressure to hit the spot with a menu that includes chicken liver pate, and groundnut soup with coconut rice

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Country enthusiast Susan Rogers hosts the final dinner party in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, hoping her French cuisine will win her extra points. She also demonstrates her skills with an accordion and gives her guests an origami masterclass, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Brockley Hall Hotel in Saltburn-by-the-Sea, North Yorkshire, where owner Heather Garcia and manager Sally Lewis hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alistair Richardson welcomes his rivals to his family owned B&B, The Star Inn 1744, in Thrussington, Leicestershire. The refurbished village pub impresses Steve and Tracy, but Heather and Sally's stay gets off to a far from spotless start

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Croft Farm Park in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, where owners Jason and Michelle Jones are keen to show off their new luxury lodges

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests arrive at Harbour Vista in Poole, Dorset, where most of them have been expecting something lavish - so they are surprised to be staying in owner Steve Webster's house

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time, to find out how much they've been paid and to settle some scores. Heather and Sally from Brockley Hall Hotel want some answers about why one of their rooms didn't scrub up. Plus, Alistair from The Star Inn 1744 queries his guests' cleanliness comments

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: To mark the 200th anniversary of Ludwig van Beethoven's birth in 1970, Daniel Barenboim and Christopher Nupen collaborated on a 13-part series about the man and his music. Much of the material they shot was never broadcast and, until recently, the footage lay dormant for half a century. Now, as the 250th anniversary is celebrated, the series has been resurrected in its original form. In this opening episode, Barenboim draws on excerpts from piano sonatas, concertos, and symphonies by Beethoven - comparing them with superficially similar works by Mozart

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Daniel Barenboim shines the spotlight on Beethoven's formal innovations - just as he refused to show subservience to his aristocratic patrons, he also flouted convention in music

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Daniel Barenboim turns to the monumental Waldstein sonata - one of the most musically ingenious and technically demanding of the 32 piano sonatas

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Barenboim's fiery interpretation of the Appassionata sonata, a spectacular encapsulation of the synthesis of extremes that he discussed in the third episode

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Daniel Barenboim turns his attention to the Leonore Overtures Nos 2 and 3, elucidating the path that Beethoven took from one to the other and the musical reasons for his revisions

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: The composer's Piano Concerto No 4, a soulful and contemplative work that finds Beethoven at his most poetic, and a piece holding a special place in the lore of his life and career

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: The remarkable Fourth Piano Concerto concludes with Daniel Barenboim alongside Sir Adrian Boult and the New Philharmonia Orchestra

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: The effortless musicality and irrepressible joy that have made generations of music lovers fall in love with the A Major Cello Sonata, performed here by Jacqueline du Pré

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Daniel Barenboim turns his attention to Beethoven's Third Symphony, the Eroica, a watershed moment in the evolution of Beethoven's artistry and, indeed, of music itself

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: An up-close look at the singular qualities with which Beethoven imbued all his work - the sheer breadth of his expression and his sensitivity for colour and sound

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: Beethoven's final piano sonata's first movement, with its many differences in tonal and formal expansiveness, motivic spontaneity, and compositional architecture

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: The second movement of Sonata No 32, which presents a vision of eternity undisturbed and a spiritual expression of pure innocence consciously won through the lessons of experience

programme.title: Barenboim on Beethoven
programme.desc: A spirited performance of Beethoven's Fifth Symphony, with the young Daniel Barenboim at the helm of the New Philharmonia Orchestra

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Brixworth, Northamptonshire, rugby fan Ian wants to leave the property that he and wife Sarah bought together two years ago. With a toddler and a couple of dogs, their two-bed rural semi is bursting at the seams. However, Sarah believes the house has the potential to cater for a growing family and wants to stay - if they can sort out their dingy ground floor. Kirstie wants to open up the downstairs and drive a digger through the conservatory, but will Ian and Sarah like the idea?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Northamptonshire with Isabel and Louis Prat, whose three decades of marital bliss is being shaken by their house. The former social worker and nurse are desperate to enjoy their retirement in their dream home, but while Louis is passionate about the abode and the local area, Isabel hates their property. With a refurb budget of £70,000, Kirstie is confident she can give Isabel the ground floor space she wants, while Phil takes to the road with the couple to show them the amazing homes they could buy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Model and barrister Cynthia Umezulike hosts the third dinner party in Liverpool, and hopes her meal including tribal fish, a traditional Nigerian jeloff and an exotic fruit platter will impress her guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Rock music enthusiast Glen Simpson hosts the fourth dinner party in Liverpool. He rustles up sticky blackened pork and an Elvis-inspired dessert of deep fat-fried chocolate bars with home-made peanut butter and banana ice-cream, but grievances among the guests threaten to derail the evening's entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Stade Court Hotel in Hythe in Kent, where some of the guests have cleanliness concerns and are forced to call in the management

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mandy McCready and her assistant Sam Gould welcome their rivals to the Goodlife Guest House in Harwich, Essex - a location that is met with raised eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores, with Adam Borton and Holly Syme from the Somerset House Hotel keen to put Belinda and Brenda's sleeping issues to bed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Mushgon Dadfar hosts the first dinner party in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire, and has high hopes for her Caribbean-themed evening. However, the guests have little time to let their meal settle before they face an energetic Zumba session

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Housewife Pip Massey welcomes the diners to her home for the second dinner party of the week in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire. As a fortysomething woman who lunches and is used to entertaining, she has high hopes that all those years of practice will make her glamorous evening a success

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Landscape gardener Darren Leech hosts the third dinner party in and around Crewe and Nantwich, Cheshire. He hopes to impress his guests with fine food, including smoked haddock and black pudding, and entertainment that involves laughing at his bottom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Student Emma Davies hosts the fourth dinner party in the Crewe and Nantwich area of Cheshire, hoping to woo her guests with a creative menu featuring stuffed pork and a home-made gnocchi starter as well as treating them to a musical performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hypnotherapist Russell Stubbs hosts the final dinner party in Crewe and Nantwich, Cheshire, hoping to impress his guests with a rock-night theme. In a bid to improve his chances of claiming the £1,000 prize, he prepares a meal using British produce, before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Storms That Stole Christmas
programme.desc: Trees were felled, trains were cancelled, Gatwick Airport was in chaos and 50,000 homeowners made do without power. This documentary, the first of two telling the stories of those who bore the brunt of the bad weather over Christmas 2013 and the surrounding period, features amateur footage, eyewitness testimony and expert commentary

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the policing of roads in Northamptonshire, which has borne more than its fair share of funding cuts. This has resulted in fewer police officers available to attend a huge range of traffic issues, from the routine to the surreal, on the county's 3,000-mile road network, as well as a spike in crime

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three boys are admitted for very different reasons, including cyclist Ollie, who arrives with head, neck and facial injuries having been involved in a traffic accident. Cameras also follow Dominic, another 16 year old. He was recovering at home after having his tonsils out when his throat started bleeding and he had to go to hospital

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Patients include 54-year-old John, who was involved in a cycling accident in which he went over his handlebars and was unconscious for 10 minutes. Sydney, who's 87, has reluctantly come to A&E after he experienced severe chest pains, while Alan has fallen and badly fractured his elbow

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three boys are admitted for very different reasons, including cyclist Ollie, who arrives with head, neck and facial injuries having been involved in a traffic accident. Cameras also follow Dominic, another 16 year old. He was recovering at home after having his tonsils out when his throat started bleeding and he had to go to hospital

programme.title: The Biggest Little Railway in the World
programme.desc: The model train is only halfway through its journey to Inverness, but has to drive through bad weather and harsh terrain with the volunteers due to head home and the security team poised to call off track-laying for safety reasons. A rack and pinion set-up is used to make the steepest sections of track passable, but they still remain one of the toughest stretches of the journey

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Musical couple Paul and Judith Corazzo from Dorset have been dreaming of buying a holiday home in sunny Spain, where they can escape from their hectic work lives back in the UK. For their budget of £140,000, Jasmine Harman shows them five properties to consider

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien assess sewing machines in Kent as they continue their journey across the UK to find unique and valuable items 'lost' in people's homes

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole tries to restore a monkey bike, and Simon O'Brien makes use of all his skills as he tries to give new life to an old racing bicycle

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Erin and JB host a 90th birthday party, but the cooking proves challenging and JB has a near disaster with his boar roast. May and her family start work on turning a rundown outbuilding into a yoga retreat. For Tim and Margreeth, it's the day of the wedding party, but the venue - the shed in the woods - isn't quite finished. With hungry guests waiting to be fed, the bride and groom are getting increasingly anxious

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Tom and Georgina have big plans to renovate and supersize a run-down bungalow in Berkshire, but when Charlie Luxton offers his opinion the project takes a whole new direction

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at the Black Lion in Halland, East Sussex, where host Nigel Fright gets off to a shaky start when a kettle goes missing from one of the rooms. Later, he takes the guests to a salsa class, where Sherrill Tacy and Hayley Cotton are surprised by some of his dance moves

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Wheatsheaf Inn in Exning, near Newmarket, Suffolk, where guests are welcomed by owner Ken Clutterbuck and employee Ginny Trow. The proprietor tries to win his rivals round with his unique sense of humour, but tensions rise when the contestants go for a spin on a go-kart track

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sherrill Tacy hosts at the Sherwood Guesthouse in New Brighton on the Wirral, and is praised for the establishment's value for money. However, there is upset when her breakfast leaves a lot to be desired, and her final review is far from perfect

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Final hosts Mark and Rachael Dann welcome the contestants to the Big Bear Lodge in Shropshire. They face the tough job of trying to keep the rift between some of the guests to a minimum in their ski-themed B&B, and their afternoon activity of canoeing raises a few laughs but accusations of cheating occur when the boys begin to get competitive

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service that they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp offers a guide to home-made creations to make Christmas a bit more special, from decorations to food and drink. Among the ideas featured in the show are recipes for handmade cheese and candied pecans, as well as two different festive cocktails with bitters. Kirstie's suggestions for projects include an alternative to the traditional tree that will not shed pine needles, a frozen ice bucket, and a selection of dazzling decorations

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: Make Do and Mend
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge use the handiwork and design skills with which they have renovated their French chateau to give viewers ideas on fixing up their own homes. In the first show, Angel helps Miriam transform her 1970s bathroom into a relaxing sanctuary - without changing either the suite or the tiles - and Dick digs out his old handmade smoker to help teach Phil the ancient art of cheese smoking. The couple also advise Tom and Sim how to bring their unique front door into the 21st century

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: When Erin and JB can't fix the doors back onto their solarium, Dick Strawbridge steps in to help them find a solution to their rusted hinges. Another leak is found, but this time from the roof, so they call in some professional climbers to scale their bell tower to find the source of the problem. With wedding season over, Tim and Margreeth launch a foodie weekend. With a professional chef hired to produce the food and some trainee butlers on hand to serve more than 20 guests, the couple can take it easy - apart from foraging for mushrooms, dressing the dining room and fixing a guest's belt. Meanwhile, May and her son Jack get the yoga room ready for the imminent arrival of guests.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of 37-year-old Angelo Mastropietro, as he transforms a damp, dark and abandoned cave in Worcestershire. Having recently been diagnosed with multiple sclerosis, Angelo wants to create a retreat to help him cope with the news and become a 21st-century caveman. He has a budget of £100,000 and plans to almost single-handedly carve, cut and drill into the hillside to make the cave comfortable for contemporary living. However, there is no manual for a project of this kind, and the unique challenge soon becomes an obsession

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: After another busy year, Dick and Angel prepare for the festive season at Chateau de la Motte-Husson. There's an exquisite menu, complete with home-made treats, while Angel creates beautiful crafts as the family host a traditional French Christmas for friends and family - and some special guests too

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Neil, 53, is rushed into hospital with severe chest and lung injuries after coming off his bike, and 40-year-old Michael is brought in with chest pain and a heart rate of up to 180bpm after collapsing on a golf course. Lastly, doctors treat 27-year-old George, who accidentally grazed his eye on a low hanging branch

programme.title: Britain's Killer Storms
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary-drama telling the story of five major storms that battered the nation during 2012. Each of them carried a deadly threat, from hurricane-force winds to flash flooding, and this programme hears from people who survived them. It combines archive footage with reconstruction and satellite images to piece together how these extreme weather events were formed, what made them unique and the impact they had

programme.title: Sex Toy Stories
programme.desc: Documentary following eight volunteers working with the Ann Summers company to create a new vibrator. The contributors, including a 69-year-old grandmother, a twentysomething virgin and a middle-aged divorcee who has never achieved an orgasm, test existing products on the market and find inspiration in their kitchen cupboards for their dream sex toy, hoping the retailer can get it on to shop shelves in time for Valentine's Day

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Neil, 53, is rushed into hospital with severe chest and lung injuries after coming off his bike, and 40-year-old Michael is brought in with chest pain and a heart rate of up to 180bpm after collapsing on a golf course. Lastly, doctors treat 27-year-old George, who accidentally grazed his eye on a low hanging branch

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits London artists Freddie Robins and Ben Coode-Adams, who left their cramped flat and took on the conversion of a Grade II-listed timber-framed barn in the Essex countryside. At seven times the size of the average three-bedroom house, the project proved very challenging, but also gave them plenty of opportunity to be creative

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May put three supercars through their paces in Italy. Their weapons of choice are the 691bhp Lamborghini Aventador, McLaren's hi-tech MP4-12C, and a British brute in the form of the Noble M600. The journey begins at Nardo, a high-speed testing ground so vast it can be seen from space, and includes a nerve-racking drive in Rome before reaching its conclusion with a timed challenge against the Stig at the Imola circuit

programme.title: Rick Stein's Far Eastern Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef ends his exploration of the Far East's most diverse food cultures by visiting Bangladesh, sampling the curry on offer in the country that has played a major role in establishing the success of Indian restaurants throughout the UK

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank face the Georgia Gambler, while Danielle and Robbie may have struck gold

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Two siblings are better than one when it comes to negotiating, which has Mike looking to bundle in order to save his bottom line

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May travel to Beijing to learn about China's car industry, which has seen great expansion in recent years - but also have a violent encounter with one of the Stig's cousins. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond immerses himself in the world of Nascar at a race in Texas, and the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Roadster is wrestled around the test track, emitting serious amounts of noise and smoke in the process. Future host Matt LeBlanc is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: The team sets out to design and build an all seeing 360 degree camera car. A frontline X5 with a serious mechanical failure is needed urgently back out on the front line, and the cops encounter a cuddly criminal and a hungry speed-demon

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: Mick puts in an order for 20 new beat cars just as the workshop is full of damaged ones, including one an officer was lucky to walk away from with his life. Joe is on the hunt for a new job and not everyone will try out Tony's raw food diet

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy take the children out trick or treating for Halloween, but the night soon turns disastrous for Lee when he loses his mobile on the porch of a spooky Victorian house. After returning to the property to retrieve his phone, Lee discovers that the building is full of secrets that would be far better left undisturbed

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy pop out on a last-minute Christmas Eve mission, leaving their youngsters in the apparently capable hands of Geoffrey - cutting more of a strict and stuffy Victorian gent than usual - and wife Wendy. Alas, things don't quite go to plan for the outward-bound duo, as a theft and unexpected trip into deep countryside await. Not only that, but there are encounters with an aggressive bull in a field and a terrifying truck driver to endure. Meanwhile, back at home, Lee's lovably feckless father Frank turns up to offer gifts - in his own inimitably festive way. Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Bobby Ball star

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: As Lee Mack brings the popular sitcom to an end, a chance to see some of the unintentionally comic moments during filming that ended up on the cutting-room floor

programme.title: Meet The Richardsons at Christmas
programme.desc: More celebs turn up, which is perfect for Lucy's panto, but did Lucy get so drunk she invited Jason Donovan over, and will Johnny Vegas be Jon and Lucy's new stepfather?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in a 1950s-style race from London to Edinburgh. On the footplate of the A1 Tornado steam train, Jeremy has to feed the boiler with a constant supply of coal, while Richard braves the saddle of a Vincent Black Shadow motorbike and James drives an old Jaguar XK120 as the trio discover what Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. Michael Schumacher drives the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Groundhog Day (1993)
programme.desc: An obnoxious TV weatherman reporting on a small town's annual festival finds himself caught in a bizarre time loop, and is forced to relive the same day over and over again. While at first he tries to exploit his predicament, he is ultimately driven to mend his ways and adopt a less cynical attitude. Comedy, starring Bill Murray, Andie MacDowell, Chris Elliott and Stephen Tobolowsky

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team sets off on a high-altitude trek from Kathmandu, capital of Nepal, to the Forbidden City of Lo Manthang, a secretive kingdom perched high on the Tibetan plateau, on the far side of the Himalayas. On a five-day expedition through the highest mountains, deepest gorges and harshest terrain on the planet, Paddy McGuinness, Freddie Flintoff and Chris Harris battle huge river crossings, vast mudslides and dizzying mountain passes on a trip that would test even the hardiest new 4x4s to the limit. But Paddy, Freddie and Chris aren't crossing the Himalayas in new 4x4s. They're crossing the Himalayas in a small old Peugeot, a very compact old Renault, and Nepal's first (and only) home-built car

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian tests his preconceptions of Albania, guided on a whistlestop tour of the country by local TV presenter and journalist Erjona Rusi. Along the way, he tries to discover why Albania has remained a stubbornly unfashionable holiday destination, meeting those at the extremes of the country, from the rural farmers to the billionaire playboys who live in the cities in the company of supermodels

programme.desc: Celebrities undertake journeys on some of the most perilous routes in the world. In Alaska, Sue Perkins and Charley Boorman drive along the notorious Dalton Highway, a dirt track originally constructed in the 1970s as a supply road for the Trans-Alaska oil pipeline. The pair struggle to cope with the Arctic conditions and constant threat of avalanches, but receive help from experienced truckers who teach them some unwritten rules for surviving the road's many hazards

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Cold Feet star Fay Ripley for a wintry mini-break in Norway's capital, where they first head to the Thief hotel - home to an art collection including works by Warhol, Hirst, and Koons, as well as a Bryan Ferry-themed dining room. They also take a ride on the city's most popular toboggan run and try to master cross-country skiing, before visiting the National Gallery to check out Edvard Munch's masterpiece The Scream, and sampling Michelin-starred food at Kontrast

programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the next leg of his journey from London Bridge to Hastings, exploring the lives of Victorian hop-pickers along the way. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey through Kent. He starts in Canterbury, where he finds out how the city's cathedral was saved from the Second World War air raids, then goes whelk fishing in Whitstable and explores the origins of a seaside swim in Margate

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Sandwich to Folkestone, exploring a secret port that helped ferry troops and vital supplies to France in the First World War. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels along England's south coast from Hythe to Hastings. Along the way, he discovers a hardy breed of sheep on Romney Marsh, explores Kent's sparkling-wine industry and learns why the Victorians became obsessed with ferns

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on a journey from Ayr to Skye. He begins by visiting the home town of poet Robert Burns and finds out how to make haggis. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Documentary following the fortunes of humans and animals over the course of a year in Alaska, which is by far the biggest US state and still one of the wildest places on Earth with deep forests and vast mountain ranges. The arrival of spring sees Alaska go through a huge transformation as water, light and warmth return, with animals emerging from hibernation and rushing to cash in on the riches of the season. Dougray Scott narrates

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The land is bathed in 24-hour sunlight during the short Alaskan summer, luring hummingbirds up from Mexico, exposing deserts in the Arctic and relying on parachuting firefighters to tackle forest fires in its vast wilderness. Grizzly bears fatten up on a sudden wealth of salmon, a caribou calf joins a vast herd on its great migration and a huge male moose finds unlikely ways to impress a female. Among the human population, a dedicated grower of giant vegetables takes his half-ton pumpkin to the Alaska State Fair

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom

programme.desc: A festive edition of the dating show in which singletons meet up with possible partners at a restaurant in the hope of finding love, before deciding whether they want to take things further. This time, former bodybuilding champion Kieran goes on a date with 23-year-old student nurse Abi. Meanwhile, 67-year-old Suzy is set up with Fred, a fellow divorcee who is looking for some excitement in his life, and single mother Amy meets 29-year-old Geordie Scott

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A look back to the couples taking a second shot at finding love again, including 47-year-old mother of two Emma's date with Peter, and self-confessed geek Sarah, who meet aspiring comic book writer Nick. Having been single for five years following the loss of his partner, Dale had high hopes for 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: Radio DJ and TV presenter Matt Edmondson, showbiz legend Debbie McGee, singer and dancer Kimberly Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes take on everything the maze throws at them. One particularly wobbly challenge leaves the celebrities dumbfounded and in fits of hysterics, but will it derail the entire outing? Richard Ayoade is the man in charge

programme.title: Christmas at Highclere Castle
programme.desc: Part one of two. A behind-the-scenes look at life in Highclere Castle - the setting of the popular television series and film Downton Abbey - as they deck their halls and prepare to celebrate Christmas in their own unique way. The programme follows the small team of dedicated staff who are tasked with creating seasonal cheer in the castle, as they race to get everything prepared in time to welcome small groups of guests for guided tours and tea, as well as a virtual gin cocktail party hosted by the Earl and Countess of Carnarvon

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Following Sarah Beeny and her family as they relocate from London to Somerset, renovating a semi-derelict former dairy farm into their dream family home. In the sixth episode, Sarah and Graham face new problems as the ground floor of the new home is completely flooded due to a downpour of rain. Later, the family decide they want to adopt some hens from a battery farm, to join the ones they bought from a poultry farm that live a happy, free-range life in their garden

programme.title: Chef vs Corner Shop
programme.desc: Somerset local Dean Edwards takes on another celebrity chef in the culinary contest, with the rivals sourcing all their ingredients from a corner shop. Hosted by Chizzy Akudolu

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Dumfries and Galloway, where they find an electric organ and a vintage oil dispenser in barns that are brimming with junk

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Surrey, where they visit a collector of Kawasaki motorbikes

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien has ambitious plans to turn a pile of old slate into an unusual lamp, while Henry Cole sets his heart on upcycling the seat from an old pony and trap

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien continue their mission to repurpose old cast-offs into cash, making an extraordinary find from a Dutch designer in accountant Debbie's lean-to

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Dumfries and Galloway, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet Alan, who works in the forestry business. Henry decides to give four bar stools a dayglo makeover, while Simon transforms two old sheep shearer seats into an extraordinary bench

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp sets a challenge to make the best festive hamper. There are also sweet baked samosas and mini paper sculptures

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp returns to offer advice on how to have a stylish Christmas, beginning with festive crafters battling it out in a best-decorated tree competition

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Christmas
programme.desc: Four festive crafters compete to make the best Christmas hamper. Plus, tips on Christmas tree applique and two simple craft projects that can make the festive season sparkle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their 'authentic' Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Atlanta, Georgia, in an attempt to save a family-run smokehouse restaurant plagued by mismanagement and lazy cooking. Michon's owner, Al Wilson, had always hoped he could pass his beloved business on to daughter Natalie, but when he suffered a collapsed lung the handover came about much earlier than expected. Now it's down to Gordon to motivate Natalie and save Michon's from disaster

programme.title: Christmas at Chatsworth House
programme.desc: One-off documentary going behind the scenes of Chatsworth, one of England's most impressive stately homes, as the Duke, Duchess and their 800 staff brace themselves for an influx of 200,000 visitors over the 2019 festive season. Christmas is the most important event for the Derbyshire estate and crucial to its survival. In just five days, the house is transformed with 30 Christmas trees, 60,000 baubles, and a million fairy lights. But this year Derbyshire has been crippled by unprecedented flooding. Can family and staff rally to make this a season to be remembered?

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The comedians gather for the grand final, to find which one of them will be going home with Taskmaster Greg Davies' golden head - a prize that lies within the grasp of four of them. But there are still more games to be played, leading to Katherine Parkinson searching for a spider, Daisy May Cooper destroying a mannequin and Johnny Vegas's pocket watch finally coming in handy

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the festive season in Devon and Cornwall with people whose livelihood depends on this busy time of year. The first stop is Cornwall's Lizard peninsula, to meet the Richards family, who have been farming this region for more than 500 years. Cameras also follow Devon artist Luna North, whose love of the region inspires her to paint her own Christmas card

programme.title: Inside Poundland: Secrets from the Shop Floor
programme.desc: Part two of two. Area manager Colin prepares for the opening day of a new store in Stockton-on-Tees, while managing director Barry oversees the national launch of a homeware range

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix presents as two leading chefs try to create a perfect replica of Domino's Pepperoni Passion pizza. It is the brand's top-selling pizza in the UK, but a world away from the high-class cuisine usually served by the two rivals - Jason Atherton, who holds four Michelin stars, and proud Italian Francesco Mazzei, who is famous for bringing the spicy ‘Nduja sausage to the UK. Both chefs go to outlandish extremes to perfect their replicas, from spending massive sums on speciality ovens to conducting spy-missions at their local pizza parlours. stores. Only one can win, however, and that decision is made by a panel of Domino's bosses

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: The Winners
programme.desc: The first of two specials paying tribute to the winners from past shows, made to celebrate the series' 10th anniversary. The first programme focuses on the winners from the first five series, reliving their most memorable moments, from their first Signature challenge to their final Showstopper

programme.title: The Year That Changed Love
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the impact of Covid-19 on people's love lives, from the story of two Edinburgh residents who chose to go into isolation together after just one date, to a separated couple who found themselves willing to give things another try when in lockdown together with their son. The programme explores how the use of dating apps escalated as lockdown began, and features personal stories of people embracing Zoom romance and socially distanced dates

programme.title: Chef vs Corner Shop
programme.desc: Chizzy Akudolu hosts the contest in Somerset, as local boy and chef Dean Edwards summons all his experience, uses all his skill and finds a bit of good luck to try and defeat the line-up of celebrity chefs and the local challenger who await. Dishes include mizo-glazed aubergine with parsnip puree, chard shallots and puffed rice, chicken and artichoke ravioli and deep-fried artichoke and a caramelised pineapple and ginger cake with salted caramel sauce and smoked whipped cream

programme.title: Chef vs Corner Shop

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: Harry Hill hosts as young cooks take part in a culinary competition to determine which of them is Britain's best junior baker. Judges Prue Leith and Liam Charles oversee proceedings in the opening heat as the first 10 of the 20 contenders enter the tent to tackle two challenges. Baking knowledge and jam-making skills are put to the test in a tricky first Technical in which the bakers are asked to follow Prue's surprise recipe for a tea party classic. This is followed by impressive Showstopper cakes themed around the bakers' favourite school subjects

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Edinburgh couple David and Venus share a passion for Portugal, so would like a holiday home in the Algarve. Jasmine Harman lines up five properties for their £95,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps potential buyers Ali Harris and Steve Ashby to explore the beautiful region of Abruzzo in southern Italy, where the dream of retiring to run a B&B

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the first of five programmes from Edinburgh, delicatessen owner and whisky connoisseur Tracy Dobbie uses alcohol to break the ice. Hoping to claim the £1,000 prize, she begins with a specially made cocktail and serves a main course containing a bottle of wine, but two of the guests are experts when it comes to drink

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second meal in Edinburgh sees the four contestants head to wine critic Paul Dwyer's house, with rifts already starting to appear. Not everyone is delighted with the vegetarian host's meat-free Tuscan menu, and his hopes of impressing them with lectures about grapevines are soon dashed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Texas-born Tanya Williams tries to impress her guests in Edinburgh with six courses of cuisine from the southern states of America. However, it becomes apparent she may have bitten off more than she can chew and the atmosphere around the table turns decidedly cold

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Catering manager James Gammie puts his bartending experience to good use by serving a different cocktail with each course during his dinner party in Edinburgh. Although he did not see eye to eye with fellow diner Tracy Dobbie earlier in the competition, it seems his whisky concoction may finally win her round

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: For the final meal in Edinburgh, Jennifer Crosbie hopes to impress her four guests and claim the £1,000 cash prize by improving on two dishes served up earlier in the contest. Paul Dwyer accepts her risotto might be better than his, but James Gammie is adamant his monkfish was tastier. However, the quality of food is not the host's only concern

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart cheats during an exam and finds himself hailed as a child genius, but soon discovers he is not really cut out for the academic life - especially as it means being sent away to a special school

programme.desc: Homer reluctantly pawns the TV to pay for family counselling sessions - but Dr Marvin Monroe's shocking treatment yields unexpected results

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for West Babylon, New York, to help the inexperienced owners of restaurant Classic American deal with their escalating debts. The chef struggles to cope with disorganised staff and an unappealing menu, but quickly realises the real problem lies in the kitchen, where a lack of leadership and communication is causing serious trouble

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Philadelphia to help failing Mexican restaurant Zocalo. programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Wiltshire couple Edward Lea and his wife found their happy retirement was short-lived when an imposing 8ft breeze-block wall - dubbed the Great Wall of China - was built by their neighbour between their properties. In Scotland, Karen Ryrie and her elderly mother are fed up with living opposite John Tyer, his three dogs and a huge family of rabbits. Following their complaint about the smell, Karen's subsequent accusation of assault has made the dispute far more serious. Elsewhere, Linda Bird had not been expecting to wear headphones around the house when she moved to Bedfordshire for a quiet life, but the issue has escalated beyond excessive noise to become a battle over boundaries with neighbour Stanislav Fajdel

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers chase a debt of almost £2,000 in unpaid parking fines, and later encounter the extraordinary case of a debt of £80,000 owed by a hotel owner to his ex-girlfriend. However, as they begin to search the property, they call upon police back-up as the agents fear the debtor may have access to firearms. Elsewhere, two officers head to a car garage in Manchester where the owner owes £2,000 after losing a court case over a faulty vehicle

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents chase more than £1,700 in unpaid parking fines in south-east London, but struggle to pinpoint the debtor. Meanwhile, officers in north Wales try to recover the £2,000 owed by a tradesman to a former employer, and in Kent agents chase £8,000 owed by a jewellery shop to two former employees

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.desc: The team investigates the beating and rape of an Afghan woman in Central Park. As it probes the violent and disturbing case, the victim's family turn their backs on her. Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay star

As the investigation proceeds, however, the New York detectives begin to suspect they are dealing with something other than a straightforward homicide. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

Drama, starring Peter Falk, Ed Begley Jr, Burt Young and Tyne Daly

All the evidence points toward suicide - but the sleuth is soon on the trail of an ex-convict who once conspired with the illusionist to steal military secrets. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Anthony Andrews and Karen Austin

programme.title: Columbo and the Murder of a Rock Star (1991)
programme.desc: The crafty detective pits his wits against a brilliant defence lawyer who has never lost a case. The attorney has murdered his rock star girlfriend to prevent her exposing his unethical courtroom tactics, and then framed her lover for the crime. Drama, starring Peter Falk, Little Richard, Dabney Coleman, Shera Danese, Cheryl Paris and Julian Stone

programme.title: Columbo: Negative Reaction (1974)
programme.desc: A successful photographer wants to get rid of his nagging wife so he can pursue an affair with his assistant. He murders his spouse and makes it look as if she was killed by a kidnapper, and at the same time puts an ex-con in the frame. However, the dogged detective sees through his ruse and proceeds to pick the story to pieces. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Dick Van Dyke, Don Gordon and Antoinette Bower

programme.title: Columbo: Murder - A Self Portrait (1989)

programme.title: Columbo: Now You See Him (1976)
