When a nightclub manager threatens to expose him, the illusionist kills him and arranges the perfect alibi - because at the time of the murder, he was apparently performing an escapology act. However, Columbo sets out to uncover the truth. Detective drama, with Peter Falk and Jack Cassidy

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When the daughter of a recently deceased senator is found murdered, Goren and Eames uncover a few startling facts about the family - the dead woman had tried to have her father cryonically frozen, her brother is not really the senator's son, and before cremation the old man's brain was stolen. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties in Northern Ireland and southern England, including a flat, a Victorian house with seven separate rental rooms and a 1960s terraced home. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charles Hanson and Anita Manning travel to an auction via Edinburgh, Melrose and Kelso. While Charles plays it canny in the Scottish capital, Anita blows every penny of her budget. Exchanging four wheels for three, she splashes out on a vintage pink girls' trike. while Charles takes tea, 18th-century style, for under a tenner

The pair then head to an auction in North Shields, Tyne and Wear

programme.title: Agatha Raisin

Bored with her new life in the Cotswolds, former London-based PR whizz Agatha Raisin re-doubles efforts to ingratiate herself with the local community. However, when entering its annual quiche-making competition, she inadvertently finds herself a suspect in a murder case. With her reputation tarnished and hopes of romance with a dashing ex-army neighbour seemingly thwarted, Agatha feels she has little choice but to clear her name by unmasking the real culprit. programme.desc: Part two of two. Sisko is trapped in Earth's past, where he has to assume the role of an influential historic figure in order to restore the future, which may mean sacrificing his life

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of a schoolboy thought to have died in a skateboarding accident contacts Melinda, and accuses a Grandview cop of murdering him. The medium decides to investigate further, and discovers the dead youngster had a connection to the officer's rebellious teenage daughter. Supernatural drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Gaius is overjoyed when an old flame arrives in Camelot, but Merlin discovers she has been possessed by an evil creature. However, the physician refuses to heed his young friend's warnings, putting the king's life in peril as a result. Guest starring Pauline Collins

programme.title: Almost Christmas (2016)
programme.desc: A retired mechanic who lost his wife a year earlier invites his daughters and sons to his house for a traditional celebration. However, it's not long before they start arguing, seemingly scuppering his chances of a happy Christmas. Comedy, starring Danny Glover, Romany Malco and Mo'Nique

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Raoul Moat, who shot his ex-girlfriend, her new lover and a policeman, leading to the largest manhunt in modern British history

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Police officers use unmarked cars fitted with on-board video cameras, offering an insight into vehicle crime and how it can be prevented. The programme also features footage of dangerous drivers

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: A samurai sword attack, the abduction of a dog, a group of vandals, and a domestic dispute give police plenty to deal with in Northumbria

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of John Duffy and David Mulcahy, who terrorised the south of England in the 1980s with a string of attacks on women and children near railway stations

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: The chase is on as officers pursue two car thieves who are in a stolen vehicle, while two women are caught fighting in the street in Sunderland

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Follow the work of the New Zealand Customs agents in their quest to prevent illegal items passing through the country's borders.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of New Zealand's customs agents. A drug smuggler tries to get into the country, and staff in Queenstown confront a man with a shady past

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary accessing the world of national security at Australia's biggest airports as customs and immigration officers tackle drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists

programme.desc: Documentary. Danish-Ethiopian teenager, Amy, decides to reclaim her lost identity and fight against the adoption system

programme.title: Rewind
programme.desc: Ten years ago, in November 2006, Al Jazeera English was launched. To mark that anniversary, we've created a new show, REWIND, which over the coming weeks will let us re-screen and update some of the channel's most memorable and award-winning documentaries of the past decade. Filmed against the dramatic backdrop of Doha's iconic Museum of Islamic Art, our team will be finding out what happened to some of the characters in those programmes and asking how their stories have changed in the years since our cameras left

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Vic faces an initiation test, which Halvar secretly tries to make easier for him - but he makes a terrible mistake that puts them both in danger

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby tries to prove he is cleverer than Vic by rescuing two people stuck in a wrecked boat - but soon ends up out of his depth

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls are tricked into appearing on a reality show in the Himalayas, only to find the director has set up booby traps all over the mountains to make things more interesting

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls go on a cruise where single people look for love, and help one of their fellow passengers win the heart of a famous actress

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Documentary following the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in zoos around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s, telling the history of folk and protest music. Featuring interviews and footage of artists including Joan Baez, Woody Guthrie and Leonard Cohen

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Buttons: A Christmas Tale (2018)
programme.desc: An orphan facing the propspect of life on the street receives a visit from a guardian angel, who comforts her with the story of another child's search for a family and the role another mysterious helper played in her life. Children's fantasy, starring Angela Lansbury and Dick Van Dyke

programme.title: The Lady with the Lamp (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of Florence Nightingale, who went down in medical history for her heroic efforts to treat thousands of casualties during the Crimean War, while the British Government belittled her for being a woman. Starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Time Without Pity (1957)
programme.desc: An alcoholic writer returns home after years living abroad when he learns his estranged son has been convicted of murder and sentenced to hang. Although his attempts at reconciliation are rejected, he spends the last 24 hours before the execution trying to prove his son is innocent by identifying the real killer. Mystery, starring Michael Redgrave, Ann Todd, Leo McKern and Peter Cushing

programme.title: Oxford Street
programme.desc: A Montage of the famous street around Christmas time in 1970, shot on 16mm film

programme.title: Fighting for King and Empire: Britain's Caribbean Heroes
programme.desc: During the Second World War, thousands of men and women from Britain's Caribbean colonies volunteered to join the fight against Hitler, but their contribution has largely been forgotten. In this documentary based on the film Divided By Race - United in War and Peace, veterans tell their extraordinary wartime stories and reveal how they have faced a lifelong struggle to be treated as equals by the UK government and the British people

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The team offers advice to a 19-year-old fitness instructor who claims to have never eaten a vegetable, and a woman whose menopausal hot flushes are ruining her life. Also examined is a 39-year-old photographer whose diet may be causing her spine to fuse. The results of the first Big Food Trial are announced, and Pixie McKenna investigates the reliability of do-it-yourself food-intolerance tests

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Dorien may have ulterior motives for inviting Tracey to a posh event, while Sharon makes a tidy profit out of fake Rolling Stones T-shirts. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey spreads her wings for the first time since her husband was put behind bars, and invites a handsome footballer round for dinner. Meanwhile, Sharon discovers the joys of literature. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Four children with a taste for adventure investigate a strange mystery in between lashings of ginger beer during a trip to the country. Spoof of Enid Blyton's Famous Five books that first launched the comedy series, starring Peter Richardson, Adrian Edmondson, Jennifer Saunders and Dawn French

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.title: The Exception (2016)
programme.desc: A German soldier tries to determine if the Dutch resistance has planted a spy to infiltrate the home of Kaiser Wilhelm in Holland during the onset of the Second World War, but falls for a young Jewish-Dutch woman during his investigation. Drama, starring Lily James, Jai Courtney and Christopher Plummer

programme.title: The C Word
programme.desc: Sheridan Smith stars in this drama based on the blog and book by Lisa Lynch, an account of her life after being diagnosed with breast cancer. Twenty-eight-year-old Lisa's life is going exactly the way she wanted - she has recently married the man of her dreams and her career is on the up. Then out of the blue, she receives a shocking a diagnosis from the doctor that threatens to stop her in her tracks. Right from the start, however, Lisa is determined not to let cancer change her, and begins to write about her experience - unaware of the effect it will have on her life and that of others. Paul Nicholls, Haydn Gwynne and Michael Maloney co-star

programme.title: Triggermen (2002)
programme.desc: Two small-time British con-men are mistaken for professional killers and hired to assassinate a Chicago crime boss - a situation they are quick to exploit. Comedy, starring Donnie Wahlberg, Michael Rapaport and Pete Postlethwaite

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring and revealing New Cross, Eltham, and Catford.

programme.title: Fighting for King and Empire: Britain's Caribbean Heroes
programme.desc: During the Second World War, thousands of men and women from Britain's Caribbean colonies volunteered to join the fight against Hitler, but their contribution has largely been forgotten. In this documentary based on the film Divided By Race - United in War and Peace, veterans tell their extraordinary wartime stories and reveal how they have faced a lifelong struggle to be treated as equals by the UK government and the British people

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Regular guest Alexander, Crown Prince of Yugoslavia, returns to stay in the suite in which he was born in 1945. There are also visits by actress Joan Collins, writer and comedian Stephen Fry and the Emperor of Japan, as well as 85-year-old former bookmaker Gerry Parker, who has breakfasted at Claridge's for the past 40 years. General manager Thomas Kochs takes any change very seriously and oversees every decision necessary - from new alarm clocks to a £10million renovation plan

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets (1949)
programme.desc: The penniless grandson of a duke plots to eliminate the eight relatives standing between him and a vast inheritance. He shoots, drowns, poisons and explodes his way through his family tree, but his final triumph is ruined when his lady love's husband kills himself. Ealing black comedy, starring Alec Guinness as all eight potential victims, with Dennis Price, Valerie Hobson and Joan Greenwood

programme.title: The Slipper and the Rose (1976)
programme.desc: A girl is reduced to being the downtrodden servant of her cruel stepmother after her father's death. With a little help from her fairy godmother, she wins the heart of a handsome prince, who is desperately trying to avoid being forced into a political marriage by his parents. Musical version of Cinderella, starring Gemma Craven and Richard Chamberlain

programme.title: Doctor in the House (1954)
programme.desc: A medical student is taken under the wing of three roguish colleagues who lead him astray into a series of pranks and amorous escapades that succeed in infuriating the dictatorial chief surgeon. Comedy based on the novel by Richard Gordon, starring Dirk Bogarde, Kenneth More, James Robertson Justice and Donald Sinden

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: Stories of courage, suffering and survival from servicemen and women between 1942 and 1945, as revealed by a generation of people now in their nineties and hundreds. This instalment includes the story of Fergus Anckorn who was once the youngest member of the Magic Circle and - at 96 - is now the oldest. He was taken prisoner by the Japanese in Singapore and put to work on the Burma Railway. He managed to survive using his magic to entertain his captors, who rewarded him with food that kept him and his fellow prisoners alive

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: The sacrifices and hard work of being a choir boy at St Paul's Cathedral

programme.title: The C Word
programme.desc: Sheridan Smith stars in this drama based on the blog and book by Lisa Lynch, an account of her life after being diagnosed with breast cancer. Twenty-eight-year-old Lisa's life is going exactly the way she wanted - she has recently married the man of her dreams and her career is on the up. Then out of the blue, she receives a shocking a diagnosis from the doctor that threatens to stop her in her tracks. Right from the start, however, Lisa is determined not to let cancer change her, and begins to write about her experience - unaware of the effect it will have on her life and that of others. Paul Nicholls, Haydn Gwynne and Michael Maloney co-star

programme.title: Damage (1992)
programme.desc: An English politician at the height of his career risks everything he holds dear when he gives in to his impulses and recklessly embarks on a passionate relationship with his son's girlfriend. When news of the affair reaches Whitehall, the fallout looks set to end his political ambitions. Drama, starring Jeremy Irons, Juliette Binoche, Rupert Graves, and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.title: Oxford Street
programme.desc: A Montage of the famous street around Christmas time in 1970, shot on 16mm film

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: Stories of courage, suffering and survival from servicemen and women between 1942 and 1945, as revealed by a generation of people now in their nineties and hundreds. This instalment includes the story of Fergus Anckorn who was once the youngest member of the Magic Circle and - at 96 - is now the oldest. He was taken prisoner by the Japanese in Singapore and put to work on the Burma Railway. He managed to survive using his magic to entertain his captors, who rewarded him with food that kept him and his fellow prisoners alive

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: The sacrifices and hard work of being a choir boy at St Paul's Cathedral

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The crew helps an Arab leader to reclaim his throne by claiming that Vic has a genie at his command

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre leaves the crew after an argument with Tjure, and becomes king of a land where everyone speaks with a lisp

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls perform at a princess's coronation ceremony, only to be accused of stealing an ancient jewel

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band performs in an underwater base, only to discover that anyone who spends too long down there starts to go mad

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: Documentary following the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in zoos around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones guitarist talks to Primal Scream singer Bobby Gillespie, who discusses his time in the Jesus and Mary Chain and the records that fuelled his love of music

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: Stories of courage, suffering and survival from servicemen and women between 1942 and 1945, as revealed by a generation of people now in their nineties and hundreds. programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: The sacrifices and hard work of being a choir boy at St Paul's Cathedral

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: Thirty delegations from around the world arrive to stay at the hotel for the duration of the Olympics, with the red carpet being rolled out five times a day for heads of state. World-famous Danish eatery Noma sets up a pop-up restaurant in the ballroom and Claridge's chefs are faced with providing Nordic-foraged food to thousands of guests who have paid £195 each. A couple fly in from Atlanta for the wedding of their dreams and a butler prepares a suite for one of the hotel's most valued guests, bringing furniture, hat boxes and 20 suits out of storage for just one night

programme.title: For the Love of Ada (1972)
programme.desc: A pensioner goes to great lengths to celebrate her wedding anniversary. Comedy, based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Irene Handl and Wilfred Pickles

programme.title: The Lady with the Lamp (1951)
programme.desc: Biopic of Florence Nightingale, who went down in medical history for her heroic efforts to treat thousands of casualties during the Crimean War, while the British Government belittled her for being a woman. Starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Oxford Street
programme.desc: A Montage of the famous street around Christmas time in 1970, shot on 16mm film

programme.title: Gracias Choir Christmas Concert
programme.desc: A special concert of Christmas Carols and Hymns from the Gracias Choir - an award winning choir founded in South Korea

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Long-suffering Jimmy and his mother-in-law Diana put their differences aside to make sure that Alex and Molly will still have a traditional family Christmas, but a school play adds to the pressure. Christmas special of the sitcom from 2007, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst, Celia Imrie, Ryan Sampson and Danielle Harmer

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the exceptional men, soon to be joined by women, for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Christmas special from 1989. The Essex girls steel themselves for a lonely Christmas away from their jailbird husbands. Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson star

programme.title: Murder Investigation Team
programme.desc: Gritty drama following the work of the Metropolitan Police Force's Murder Investigation Team, from the discovery of the body to the capture of the killer. Lindsey Coulson stars, with Richard Hope and Michael McKell

programme.title: White Collar Boxing League
programme.desc: Fast-paced adrenaline-filled White Collar Boxing from The WBCL. Fighting talk, getting up close and personal to the competitors in and out of the ring

programme.title: Black Gunn (1972)
programme.desc: A member of a black militant group carries out a robbery on a crime syndicate that ends in several deaths. When he is later murdered by the gangsters, his nightclub owner brother swears revenge. Crime thriller, starring Jim Brown and Martin Landau

programme.title: Cardboard Gangsters (2017)
programme.desc: A gang of lads selling drugs in Darndale in Dublin's Northside sets out to gain more money and power and enter the big leagues of the narcotics trade. Things begin to unravel quickly as not everyone in the area is willing to let them achieve the notoriety they crave without a fight. Thriller, starring John Connors and Fionn Walton

programme.title: City Swimmers
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, English men and women have braved arctic temperatures to swim in London's murky ponds. When threatened with closure by the Council, a campaign was launched to save them

programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: The story of Baltimore Ravens' 2000 Super Bowl success over New York Giants at the Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida. The Ravens became the second team in four years to win the Super Bowl after qualifying for the play-offs as one of the wildcard teams, and the 34-7 victory was the first for the franchise since leaving Cleveland under a huge cloud of controversy
